form.formComment: Dual acceptor. Form hard to fault. Comes off a 34 day let-up. Last start 4th of 9 at Goulburn Bm58 on March 10 over 1100m, on a slow track; 5.5 len behind Wandaye carrying 61kg at $3.40. Before that settled well back; won by 3.5 len at Canberra Mdn-Sw February 20 over 1000m defeating Show Rhythm with 58.5kg at $2.60. SCRATCHED.

form.formComment: Gelding returning from a spell and has won previously when first up. Finished off last preparation ninth of 12 at Kyneton Bm62 December 11 over 1103m, 6 len behind Viasain with 58kg at $16. When resuming last campaign seventh of 10 at Cranbourne Bm62 October 31 over 955m, 2 len behind Hustle In Heels with 57.5kg at $5. In a new stable now and looks good enough to take care of this field.

The run before that 4th of 8 at Gosford Cl1 on March 14 over 1200m, on a slow track; 1.5 len behind Premium with 56.5kg at $41. Worth some thought again in this easier race.

form.formComment: Was well-supported at debut, won favourite; came from midfield and won by 0.8 len at this track Super Mdn March 20 over 1000m on a soft track defeating Redzero with 58.5kg at $1.65. Won trial at Scone over 1000m on April 1. Likely to be popular with punters and looks very tough to beat again.
